title: Identity Service event payload (v1)
description: Payload shape shared by identity.verification_started, identity.verified, identity.verification_failed, identity.duplicate_suspected, identity.manual_review_required, identity.verification_expired (docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.2; identity.verification_expired's dual natural-expiry/revocation mapping per ADR-002). Produced by epd2_identity_service.events.build_identity_event. Deliberately minimal (not the full IdentityRecord state - see epd2_identity_service.events.identity_record_payload for that).
